warm_intro_dossiers.rationale: ML credit-scoring model is in-scope of EU AI Act Article 50 (2 Aug 2026). High-risk credit decisioning.
warm_intro_dossiers.ask: 15-min call to discuss Monzo's Article 50 readiness before 2 Aug

warm_intro_dossiers.rationale: Care-coordination AI is in-scope of EU AI Act Article 50. CQC and ICO are watching.
Clinical messaging + AI triage sits at NHS DTAC + MHRA SaMD + EU AI Act Article 50 intersection.
Biometric identity verification faces EU AI Act + NIST FRVT/TOP-10 + UK ICO biometric guidance.
AISI-aligned frontier safety work needs sovereign UK attestation distinct from US-cloud providers.

notes: All 5 certs are FREE tier (UNVERIFIED). They are sufficient as warm-intro lead magnets. Pro/Enterprise tiers unlock verifiable Ed25519 signatures + public verify URLs that auditors can independently validate. The cert_id is the unique identifier; verify endpoints at https://meok-attestation-api.vercel.app/verify/<cert_id> are Pro-only.
